clues: Some employees cannot connect to the corporate Wi-Fi this morning.
The Wi-Fi access points are working and broadcasting the network name.
Affected users can connect but receive 'No IP Address' errors or Automatic Private IP Addressing (APIPA) addresses.
More employees are reporting this issue after a department expansion brought in 30 new staff members.
The DHCP server shows that 100% of the IP address scope for the wireless subnet is currently leased.
